title: selaginella angustiramea
intro: Selaginella angustiramea, also known as the narrow-fruited spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, and is a type of fern-alternative plant that belongs to the group of vascular cryptogams. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Selaginella angustiramea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to fully understand its potential benefits and proper dosages.
